---
title: Lapin dans la forêt
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557542/lapinforet_20240208_rc5quu.png
description: Lapin dans la forêt
categories: ["children illustration"]
date: 2024-02-08
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784557542/lapinforet_20240208_rc5quu.png)

{{< meta description >}}
:::
